title: sesamum eriocarpum
intro: Sesamum eriocarpum, also known as the woolly cotton plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sesame family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sesamum eriocarpum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
